title: Local-first single-user application
rationale: All core workflows run locally on a single machine. No cloud dependency, no multi-user collaboration. Config is the source of truth for what should happen, SQLite for what did happen, filesystem for heavy artifacts (checkpoints, weights, logs).

title: SQLite as sole structured data store
rationale: All structured data in a single SQLite database at data/workbench.db. No Postgres, no Redis. SQLite is source of truth for run history, metrics, decisions, config versions. Large binary data stored on filesystem with paths tracked in SQLite.

title: REST + WebSocket dual communication
rationale: REST (JSON over HTTP) for config CRUD, project management, model/dataset metadata, run creation, artifact listing, AI suggestions, health checks, storage stats. WebSocket (JSON frames) for live log streaming, real-time metric streaming, run stage transitions, system resource updates, training progress.

title: YAML config with Pydantic validation and SQLite versioning
rationale: All configuration stored as YAML files on disk. Validated against Pydantic models on every read and write. Each config save creates a new row in config_versions table — system never overwrites history. Supports source tagging (user, ai_suggestion, system) and diff tracking.

title: Model adapter interface for extensibility
rationale: Each model family implements a ModelAdapter abstract interface. V1 implements CausalLMAdapter for decoder-only LMs. Interface designed to accommodate seq2seq, encoder-only, and multimodal models. UI depends on capability contract rather than assuming specific architecture.

title: Docker Compose primary, native execution supported
rationale: Docker Compose is primary deployment — convenience wrapper with same ports and behavior as native. GPU acceleration via MPS only accessible natively (Docker on macOS falls back to CPU). No distinction in application between Docker and native modes.

name: Tech stack reference
description: Frontend: React 18, TypeScript 5, Vite 5, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS 3, recharts 2, TanStack Query 5, zustand 4, react-router-dom 6, cmdk, react-resizable-panels, Monaco editor, lucide-react. Backend: Python 3.11+, FastAPI 0.110+, uvicorn, Pydantic 2, SQLAlchemy 2, aiosqlite, transformers 4.40+, peft 0.10+, trl 0.8+, torch 2.2+, bitsandbytes 0.43+, alembic 1.13+.
